ion":"Opening nocturne theme in E minor; arpeggiated LH accompaniment with lyrical RH melody descending stepwise, characteristic Chopin nocturne texture"},{"id":"A'","bar_start":10,"bar_end":21,"description":"Varied repeat of A theme with added inner voices, chromatic elaboration, and increased textural density; modulates toward B major"},{"id":"B","bar_start":22,"bar_end":30,"description":"Contrasting middle section in B minor; more harmonically restless with diminished seventh chords and sequential motion, climaxes then subsides"},{"id":"A''","bar_start":31,"bar_end":45,"description":"Return of opening theme with further ornamental variation, extended runs and passagework (bars 32-34), builds to fortissimo before subsiding"},{"id":"Coda","bar_start":46,"bar_end":57,"description":"Coda in E minor/major; ethereal texture with high register figuration, chromatic harmonies, dynamic fadeout to final tonic chord"}]}
